fundamental_law.note: IC = mean cross-sectional Spearman(ARM score, next-rebalance return) over the candidate universe; TC = mean corr(actual target weights, unconstrained score-weights); BR is an UPPER bound (monthly holdings are NOT independent — true breadth is far lower), so implied_IR is an upper bound on what the signal could deliver, to be read against the realized IR.
